promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch for bounded Thread B process-history contradiction reprocessing after the Axis4 sims reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates artifact continuity, checkpoint growth, malformed replay seams, and the late structural-history branch.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because this thread is prioritizing refinement of existing intake artifacts over starting a fresh raw-doc family.
Likely best next existing intake reduction after this save-history pass.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent save-history batch already isolates the segment structure, checkpoint lineage, malformed seams, and late structural-history branch needed for this bounded reduction pass.

candidate_items.name: ARTIFACT_CHAINED_THREAD_B_CONTINUITY_MODEL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest process-history continuity lesson in the parent batch without turning stitched save state into active authority.

candidate_items.name: SEED_RESET_AND_CHECKPOINT_GROWTH_DUAL_LAYER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Captures the parent batch's clearest growth-over-time lineage while preserving the distinction between seed resets and accumulated state.

candidate_items.name: MALFORMED_REPLAY_RESIDUE_FAILURE_PATTERN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the parent batch's strongest anti-cleanup lesson as a reusable replay/save failure pattern.

candidate_items.name: LATE_STRUCTURAL_HISTORY_BRANCH_ISOLATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Isolates the strongest compact reusable late branch from the save artifact without promoting it out of source context.

candidate_items.name: SAVE_ARTIFACT_NOT_SINGLE_CANONICAL_SNAPSHOT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the safest downstream handling rule for stitched save artifacts and prevents direct over-promotion.

quarantined_items.name: SOLE_SOURCE_AND_ACTIVE_AUTHORITY_OVERREAD
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly shows that the save carries distributed continuity and proposal-side family context rather than standalone active authority.

quarantined_items.name: NONCANONICAL_RESIDUE_AS_VALID_CONTROL_GRAMMAR
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Lowercase requests, malformed endings, and UI residue are replay/save failure patterns, not admissible control grammar.

quarantined_items.name: LATE_COUNTERS_AS_CURRENT_REPO_TRUTH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Checkpoint counts in the stitched save are process-history facts, not present-state truth for the repo or active control surfaces.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest reusable process-history and replay-handling patterns from the parent batch.
They keep source lineage explicit while avoiding a fresh raw-doc pass through the stitched save file.
They preserve the save artifact's contradictions instead of cleaning it into one canonical replay story.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain authority, grammar, or current-truth overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is valuable as process history, but not sufficient to promote save residue into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Kept the pass bounded to one parent save-history batch rather than starting a new raw folder-order family.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this Thread B process-history reduction pass.
